problem: Patients with prediabetes, diabetes, and hypertension lack access to personalized, ongoing support between clinical visits to manage their conditions effectively.
solution: Omada Health offers a virtual care program pairing patients with dedicated care teams including Certified Diabetes Care and Education Specialists (CDCES). The platform combines connected health devices, personalized coaching, behavioral science-based lessons, and data tracking to help members build sustainable health habits for diabetes, hypertension, and weight management.
